paragraphs.en: Our society places a high value on physical beauty. Americans spend an average of over $722 each year on their appearance. One in ten Americans has tried to look like a star. There's nothing wrong with trying to look our best, but excessive focus on physical appearance misses the soulful aspects of what it means to be beautiful. Trying to look like the magazine pictures can take us on a long ride away from what beauty is really about.
paragraphs.zh: 我们的社会高度重视外表美。美国人平均每年在外表上花费超722美元。十分之一的美国人曾试图模仿明星的样貌。努力展现最佳状态并无不妥，但过度关注外表会忽略美之灵魂层面的内涵。试图模仿杂志图片的样子，会让我们在偏离真正美的道路上越走越远。

words.meaning: adj. 深情的，触动灵魂的

paragraphs.en: Many of us spend far too much time, energy, and money trying to polish an image of what we think will bring attention, love, and connection. In the process, we may fail to attend to ourselves in a way that would move us toward deeper intimacy, fulfillment, and meaning. It may sound trite, but beauty is only skin deep; it's not what brings love toward us. Just read about the latest Hollywood starlets whose seeming love turns into resentment and bitter court battles. Outer beauty can be as much of a curse as a blessing.
paragraphs.zh: 我们许多人花费过多时间、精力和金钱，试图打磨一个自认为能带来关注、爱与联结的形象。在此过程中，我们可能未能以真正有助于深化亲密、实现满足和追寻意义的方式关照自身。这听起来或许老套，但美只是皮相，它并非吸引爱的根源。只需看看那些好莱坞新星，表面恩爱最终却变成怨恨和激烈的法庭争斗。外在美可以是祝福，也可以是诅咒。

paragraphs.en: We may develop a habit of being so focused on maintaining a perfect appearance that we never cultivate the inner qualities necessary to sustain and deepen intimacy and connection. As I describe in my book, The Authentic Heart, it is the courage to be authentic that connects us in a deeper way. While our initial attraction may be based, in part, on physical chemistry, it is the meeting of our inner worlds that creates the lasting intimacy and spiritual connection for which we long.
paragraphs.zh: 我们可能养成一种习惯，过度专注于维持完美外表，却从不培养维系和深化亲密关系所必需的内在品质。正如我在《真实的心》一书中所描述的，正是展现真实的勇气将我们以更深层次的方式相连。虽然最初的吸引或许部分源于外在的化学反应，但唯有内在世界的相遇才能创造我们渴望的持久亲密和精神联结。

paragraphs.en: If we redirect our attention toward cultivating inner qualities, we might find a magnetic attraction that moves us from something superficial to something that connects us to our depths. The path toward cultivating inner beauty is really simple. But what is simple is not always easy. Not everyone will see us and appreciate us as we take the courageous risk to allow ourselves to be seen as we really are. But if they don't, it is their loss, not ours. Eventually we'll find those compatible souls who appreciate us as we are.
paragraphs.zh: 若我们将注意力转向培养内在品质，或许会发现一种磁石般的吸引力，将我们从肤浅之物引向与内心深处相连的东西。培养内在美的道路其实很简单，但简单之事未必容易。当我们勇敢地冒险展现真实自我时，并非每个人都会看见并欣赏我们。但若他们看不见，那是他们的损失，而非我们的。最终我们会找到那些欣赏我们本来面目的相契合的灵魂。
